action_text: Click the filter field combobox to open it
rationale: To start building the required filter, open the filter field combobox in the filter builder so we can choose the field to filter on. BID a1055 is the filter field combobox.

action_text: Select "Short description" in the filter field combobox
rationale: Set the filter field to Short description, which is the field we must filter by. Using the combobox (a1055) to select the label should populate the field and enable the operator control.

action_text: Choose the "contains" operator in the operator combobox
rationale: After selecting the field, configure the operator to "contains" as required. The operator combobox is a1105 and should be enabled once a field is chosen.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-1f711cdf-2" into the filter value textbox
rationale: Enter the target string to match in the value input of the filter builder. The value textbox is a1108 and becomes enabled after the operator is set.
Execute the constructed filter to update the list results. The Run filter button has BID a991.
